requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — EAEU TR CU 004/2011, EAC Marking, SARM / IEC 62109 Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——EAEU TR CU 004/2011、EAC标志、SARM / IEC 62109证据
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——EAEU TR CU 004/2011、EAC標誌、SARM / IEC 62109證據

summary.en: Armenia is an EAEU member, so solar PV inverters placed on the Armenia market may require EAEU conformity assessment and EAC marking when they fall within the scope of TR CU 004/2011 on low-voltage equipment. This is a genuine Armenia market-access pathway and should not be described as inapplicable. In parallel, SARM standards practice and project-owner or grid-connection specifications may require IEC or GOST-family evidence. For inverter safety, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the key international safety standards for power converters used in photovoltaic systems; project documentation should identify model-family coverage, voltage ratings, environmental ratings, isolation, residual-current behavior, protective earthing, and manual/marking language requirements.
summary.zh: 亚美尼亚是EAEU成员，因此投放亚美尼亚市场的太阳能光伏逆变器在落入TR CU 004/2011低压设备范围时，可能需要EAEU符合性评价和EAC标志。这是亚美尼亚真实适用的市场准入路径，不应描述为不适用。同时，SARM标准实践及项目业主或并网规格可能要求IEC或GOST体系证据。对于逆变器安全，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏系统用功率变换器的关键国际安全标准；项目文件应说明型号系列覆盖、电压额定值、环境等级、隔离、剩余电流行为、保护接地，以及说明书/标识语言要求。
summary.zht: 亞美尼亞是EAEU成員，因此投放亞美尼亞市場的太陽能光伏逆變器在落入TR CU 004/2011低壓設備範圍時，可能需要EAEU符合性評價和EAC標誌。這是亞美尼亞真實適用的市場准入路徑，不應描述為不適用。同時，SARM標準實務及項目業主或併網規格可能要求IEC或GOST體系證據。對於逆變器安全，IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏系統用功率轉換器的關鍵國際安全標準；項目文件應說明型號系列覆蓋、電壓額定值、環境等級、隔離、剩餘電流行為、保護接地，以及說明書/標識語言要求。

standards_or_laws: TR CU 004/2011 — On safety of low-voltage equipment
EAEU EAC conformity marking for products within applicable technical-regulation scope
IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
SARM Armenian standards adoption or recognition practice, including IEC/GOST-family standards where applicable

summary.en: China-side evidence often includes GB/T 37408-2021 inverter technical requirements, NB/T 32004, factory safety tests, CNAS laboratory reports, and IEC 62109 reports prepared for export sales. These are useful technical inputs, but a Chinese GB/T certificate or IEC report alone is not an EAEU declaration or certificate and does not by itself authorize EAC marking for Armenia.
summary.zh: 中国侧证据通常包括GB/T 37408-2021逆变器技术要求、NB/T 32004、工厂安全测试、CNAS实验室报告，以及为出口销售准备的IEC 62109报告。这些是有用的技术输入，但中国GB/T证书或IEC报告本身不是EAEU声明或证书，也不能单独授权在亚美尼亚使用EAC标志。
summary.zht: 中國側證據通常包括GB/T 37408-2021逆變器技術要求、NB/T 32004、工廠安全測試、CNAS實驗室報告，以及為出口銷售準備的IEC 62109報告。這些是有用的技術輸入，但中國GB/T證書或IEC報告本身不是EAEU聲明或證書，也不能單獨授權在亞美尼亞使用EAC標誌。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 export test evidence where available

gap.en: Gap: the Armenia package must bridge China safety evidence into the EAEU/SARM context. Exporters should confirm TR CU 004/2011 scope, conformity route, applicant responsibility, EAC marking, technical-file language, manuals, nameplate markings, and whether IEC 62109 reports are accepted directly or need review by an EAEU-accredited conformity body. For grid-connected projects, safety evidence should also match ENA or owner technical specifications.
gap.zh: 差距：亚美尼亚资料包必须将中国安全证据衔接至EAEU/SARM环境。出口商应确认TR CU 004/2011适用范围、符合性路径、申请人责任、EAC标志、技术文件语言、说明书、铭牌标识，以及IEC 62109报告是否可直接接受或需由EAEU认可符合性机构审查。对于并网项目，安全证据还应匹配ENA或业主技术规格。
gap.zht: 差距：亞美尼亞資料包必須將中國安全證據銜接至EAEU/SARM環境。出口商應確認TR CU 004/2011適用範圍、符合性路徑、申請人責任、EAC標誌、技術文件語言、說明書、銘牌標識，以及IEC 62109報告是否可直接接受或需由EAEU認可符合性機構審查。對於併網項目，安全證據還應匹配ENA或業主技術規格。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the inverter is within TR CU 004/2011 low-voltage equipment scope; IEC 62109 evidence may be mandatory under project, lender, SARM, ENA, or owner specifications
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408-2021 and NB/T 32004 evidence is China-side or purchaser-specific and does not replace Armenia/EAEU conformity

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Armenia, do not treat EAC as inapplicable: Armenia is an EAEU member, so TR CU 004/2011 and EAC marking can be a market-access gate for in-scope PV inverters. Use IEC 62109-1/-2 and China GB/T evidence as technical inputs, but confirm the EAEU/SARM route and ENA/project safety requirements before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对亚美尼亚，不要将EAC视为不适用：亚美尼亚是EAEU成员，因此TR CU 004/2011和EAC标志可成为落入范围的光伏逆变器市场准入门槛。IEC 62109-1/-2和中国GB/T证据可作为技术输入，但出货前须确认EAEU/SARM路径及ENA/项目安全要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對亞美尼亞，不要將EAC視為不適用：亞美尼亞是EAEU成員，因此TR CU 004/2011和EAC標誌可成為落入範圍的光伏逆變器市場准入門檻。IEC 62109-1/-2和中國GB/T證據可作為技術輸入，但出貨前須確認EAEU/SARM路徑及ENA/項目安全要求。
